---
title: "Switching a Group to Open Research Practices"
format: html
---

This chapter ...

## Pages in this section

| Page | Description |
|---|---|
| [Survey](swop-survey.qmd) | description. |
| [Template Google Doc](template-google-doc.qmd) | description. |
| [Feedback Form](swop-feedback-form.qmd) | description. |
| [Additional Processes](swop-additional-processes.qmd) | description. |
| [Lessons Learned and Iterative Improvements](lessons-and-improvements.qmd) | description. |
